message:
perf(test262): Use daemon mode for EdgeBox tests (~100x faster)

Instead of spawning a new WASM process for each test (~100ms overhead),
the test262 runner now uses EdgeBox daemon mode:
- Starts edgeboxd with the AOT module at init
- Executes tests via HTTP POST to /exec (~1ms overhead)
- Stops daemon at cleanup

This should reduce EdgeBox test262 time from ~1 hour to ~5 minutes,
making it comparable to QuickJS-NG and Node.js.
